text:
From his previous work, Bob Odenkirk seemed like such an unusual choice to play an action hero, but oh god, it seems he's friggin' brilliant at it !!!
When this first popped up on Netflix, I watched it out of curiosity. A couple months later, all I could remember was the basic plot and that I'd thought it was really good, so I just watched it again........ Yep. It's still good. :D

It's refreshing to see an "Old fashioned" action film these days, where no one's trying to cram "Woken" philosophies down your throat, or trying to crow bar some agenda into the storyline.  I'm happy to see that the studio went with the classic plot of "Wronged man seeks revenge", with guns, explosions, cars, and bodies dropping like flies...... it's the sort of movie related escapism an old fashioned guy like me misses.
